items.caption: A close-up of a person's foot wearing a shoe with a sole that resembles a qwerty keyboard layout. the shoe is brown with a beige sole and appears to be a casual style. the background is blurred, but it seems to be an indoor setting with a couch and a wooden floor. the text "what typo shoes are these?" is superimposed over the image, suggesting a humorous comparison between the shoe's sole and a typewriter keyboard layout.
